910 PAIN_THRPY_CD PAIN_THRPY_CD J0520 Pain Interference with Therapy Activities CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency at which the resident's pain has limited their participation in rehabilitation thereapy sessions over the last five days. 0=Does not apply - I have not received rehabilitation therapy in the past five days. 
1=Rarely or not at all
2=Occasionally
3=Frequent
